user.title: Geberit AquaClean
user.description:
Version {version}

Enter the BLE MAC address of your AquaClean device. Leave ESPHome Proxy Host empty to use a local Bluetooth adapter on this machine. With local BLE, no connection test is performed during setup — the first poll will verify connectivity.

data.esphome_host: ESPHome Proxy Host (leave empty for local BLE)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AquaClean device. Check the MAC address, ensure the device is powered on and in BLE range, and verify any ESPHome proxy settings.
error.no_bluetooth: No local Bluetooth adapter found on this machine. An ESPHome Bluetooth proxy host is required.

abort.already_configured: This AquaClean device is already configured.

init.title: Geberit AquaClean — Settings
init.description:
Version {version}

Update the device address or proxy settings. A live connection test is performed on save when an ESPHome proxy is configured. With local BLE (no proxy), only adapter presence is checked.

data.esphome_host: ESPHome Proxy Host (leave empty for local BLE)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AquaClean device. Check the MAC address, ensure the device is powered on and in BLE range, and verify any ESPHome proxy settings.
error.no_bluetooth: No local Bluetooth adapter found on this machine. An ESPHome Bluetooth proxy host is required.
